'''[[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] Station''' was a [[Golan III Space Defense NovaGun]] station under service to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in the [[Kessel sector/Legends|Kessel sector]]. It had six [[Cargo Facility 2]]s—three on each side. The station was surrounded by multiple [[Black hole/Legends|black holes]] known as [[Maw Cluster/Legends|the Maw]], making a blind [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump extremely risky without knowledge of the proper hyperspace routes. Trying to calculate one was difficult and took time.

[[Antan Azzameen]] led his nephews [[Emon Azzameen]] and [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]], and his niece [[Aeron Azzameen]] on a [[Mission to Kessel Station|mission]] to the station, claiming that their father, [[Tomaas Azzameen/Legends|Tomaas]], and brother [[Galin Azzameen/Legends|Galin]] were still alive and were being held there. However, this was a ruse, and the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']] arrived to try and capture the siblings while Antan Azzameen, in the ''[[Big Score]]'', was free to go. Fortunately for the siblings, [[Dunari]]'s ''[[Deadman's Hand]]'' arrived in the nick of time to provide them with a hyperspace route to escape.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
